title: ANC - Switch both ANC and Transparency to Off
scenario: ANC and Transparency sub-options are disabled/greyed out when both are set to Off in Device Settings > ANC
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode toggle states and sub-options
Repeat steps 1-7 with ANC set to On and Transparency set to Off
Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode toggle states and sub-options
Repeat steps 1-7 with ANC set to Off and Transparency set to On
Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode toggle states and sub-options
expected: When both ANC and Transparency are set to Off: Both toggles are disabled/greyed out and none of the sub-options are selected. When ANC is On and Transparency is Off: ANC toggle is enabled and active, Transparency toggle is disabled/greyed out. When ANC is Off and Transparency is On: ANC toggle is disabled/greyed out, Transparency toggle is enabled and active.
